storeApps.name: Asgard's Wrath 2
storeApps.description: A massive action RPG with epic battles and deep storyline set in a mythological world.
storeApps.releaseNotes: v2.1 - New dungeon, balance improvements, controller mapping fixes.

storeApps.name: Pistol Whip
storeApps.description: An unstoppable action-rhythm experience. Shoot, dodge, and move to the beat.
storeApps.releaseNotes: v3.0 - New scenes pack, visual overhaul, haptic feedback tuned.

storeApps.name: Resident Evil 4
storeApps.description: The iconic survival horror game rebuilt from the ground up for VR.
storeApps.releaseNotes: v1.5 - Mercenaries mode added, performance optimizations for Quest 3.

storeApps.name: Among Us VR
storeApps.description: Play the smash-hit social deduction game fully immersed in virtual reality.
storeApps.releaseNotes: v1.2 - New map: The Skeld, crossplay improvements.

installedApps.name: Beat Saber
installedApps.description: Beat Saber is a VR rhythm game where you slash the beats of adrenaline-pumping music with your sabers.
installedApps.releaseNotes: v1.35 - New music pack added, improved hand tracking support, bug fixes.

installedApps.name: VR Chat
installedApps.description: VRChat offers an endless collection of social VR experiences by giving the power of creation to its community.
installedApps.releaseNotes: v2024.1 - Avatar dynamics improvements, new worlds, performance optimizations.

installedApps.name: Superhot VR
installedApps.description: SUPERHOT VR is the award-winning VR game where time moves only when you move.
installedApps.releaseNotes: v1.10 - Endless mode updates, leaderboard fixes, controller haptics improved.
